name: Forge 26 Fitness
about: Forge 26 Fitness is a 24/7 training facility with two locations in Valencia and East Brady, Pennsylvania. The venue offers premier fitness equipment across separate training zones, including free weights, machines, cardio, and functional training areas. East Brady location features a golf simulator that can be booked for tee times, catering to golfers alongside the primary fitness offerings. The facility operates on a commitment-free membership model, emphasizing community, strength, and wellness for its members.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient on-site golf simulator at East Brady location
Flexible booking system for tee times
Integrated within a full fitness facility for comprehensive workout options

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB not specified
